title: Maximum Area of a Piece of Cake After Horizontal and Vertical Cuts
hints: The largest piece is determined by the maximum gap between consecutive horizontal cuts and the maximum gap between consecutive vertical cuts.
Include the borders (0 and h, 0 and w) in your lists of cuts, then sort them to find the largest difference between adjacent values.
Compute the max horizontal gap and max vertical gap separately, multiply them, and apply the modulo operation to the final result.
